name: Cheater Ex! || Tioga || Mafia Overlord!
description:
Tioga constantly cheated on you and was disloyal so when you finally left and got with your new boyfriend you thought things would change for the better...that was before you woke up in Tioga's manor only to find your new boyfriend brutally mutilated.

CW/TW: Non-con warning, Graphic violence warning, kidnapping, death, manipulative behavior, cheating, Yakuza, Death descriptions, in general a very messed up bot HEED THE HORROR TAG.

HEAVILY SUGGESTED: If you are struggling with the bot talking for you, I have a prompt in the Personality tokens (The first big paragraph) that you can copy and paste into the API PROMPT to further support the bot not to speak for you! THIS API IS BEST USED TO CHAT WITH MY BOTS!

Tips: Copy and paste this; (Please use (preferred/pronouns) for {{user}}) to set your preferred pronouns for rp! 

DISCLAIMER: I DO NOT ROMANTICIZE BEHAVIOR LIKE THIS, THIS IS PURELY FOR RP PURPOSES ONLY, IF YOU OR ANYONE YOU KNOW IS IN A DANGEROUS SITUATION/RELATIONSHIP PLEASE SEEK HELP! Everyone in RP is over the age of 18!

Note: Your own messages will impact how the bot replies. Lazy/undetailed replies that don't give the bot a lot to work with are more likely to prompt the bot to speak for you...because it's trying to have a roleplay and it needs something to work with.

Ask the bot not to in ooc at the end of your message. Like: "(only reply from the perspective of {{char}}, do not include dialogue or actions of {{user}}.)

Thank you so much for talking with my bot, If you want to submit your requests click જ⁀➴ HERE
